title: Aranet Cross-Floor Temperature Consistency Analysis
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval floor=coalesce(floor, level, "")
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval building=coalesce(building, site, "main")
| stats avg(temp) as avg_temp stdev(temp) as temp_spread by floor building
description: High spread across floors on the same loop hints balancing issues or rogue space heaters.
value: Improves tenant comfort scores and chiller efficiency.
implementation: (1) Require floor metadata. (2) Compare at same OAT window. (3) Feed commissioning reports.
visualization: Bar avg by floor; error bar spread.
grandmaExplanation: We compare floors to see if some levels are always warmer or cooler.
